subprocess_flow.description: Conduct a detailed review of the Client Technical Requirements and the AI Suitability Report. This involves identifying specific performance benchmarks, security constraints, and integration points with existing client systems to ensure the architecture is grounded in actual client needs.
success_criteria: All technical constraints and performance targets are documented.
subprocess_flow.purpose: To ensure the architecture is grounded in actual client needs.
triggers: Approval from AI Suitability & Ethics Screening.
governance_requirements: Alignment with client data sovereignty policies.

change_management.change_request_process: Requirements changes must be logged in the RFP management tool.

subprocess_flow.description: Evaluate and select the most appropriate foundation models (LLMs) and agentic orchestration frameworks based on the refined requirements. Consider factors like latency, cost, and specific capabilities such as reasoning or tool-calling to establish the core technology stack.
success_criteria: Selected stack aligns with performance and cost constraints.
subprocess_flow.purpose: To establish the core technology stack for the solution.

step_risks_and_controls.risk: Selection of incompatible or overly expensive models.

change_management.change_request_process: Model changes require architect lead approval.

subprocess_flow.description: Define the data architecture, including vector database selection, indexing strategies, and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) pipelines. Ensure data privacy and security protocols are integrated into the data flow to provide secure information access.
success_criteria: Data flow ensures low latency and high relevance in retrieval.
subprocess_flow.purpose: To ensure the AI has access to the right information securely.

step_risks_and_controls.control: Security review of data flow and indexing optimization.

change_management.change_request_process: Schema changes must be reviewed by the data lead.

improvement_inputs: Retrieval accuracy metrics from previous pilots.

subprocess_flow.description: Map out the specific agent roles, their responsibilities, and the tools they will interact with. Define the communication protocols between agents and the human-in-the-loop touchpoints to establish the operational logic of the system.
success_criteria: Workflows cover all functional requirements identified in the intake.
subprocess_flow.purpose: To define the operational logic of the agentic system.

step_risks_and_controls.risk: Over-complex workflows leading to agent loops or failures.

change_management.change_request_process: Workflow logic changes require peer review.

improvement_inputs: Agent performance logs from similar use cases.

subprocess_flow.description: Design the hosting environment and the security architecture, including defining VPCs, IAM roles, and encryption protocols. This ensures a secure and scalable foundation for the AI solution that meets client standards.
success_criteria: Infrastructure design meets client security and scalability standards.
subprocess_flow.purpose: To provide a secure and scalable foundation for the AI solution.

step_risks_and_controls.control: Cloud cost estimation and resource optimization.

governance_requirements: Adherence to ISO 27001 or client-specific security frameworks.

change_management.change_request_process: Infrastructure changes require security lead sign-off.

subprocess_flow.description: Consolidate all design components into a comprehensive Technical Architecture Document. This document serves as the primary technical deliverable for the RFP response, detailing the solution's feasibility and performance.
success_criteria: Document is complete, professional, and meets all RFP technical requirements.
subprocess_flow.purpose: To produce the final technical deliverable for the parent step.

step_risks_and_controls.risk: Incomplete documentation of critical technical details.
step_risks_and_controls.control: Peer review of the final document.

governance_requirements: Final sign-off from the Lead AI Architect.

change_management.change_request_process: Final document edits via tracked changes.

improvement_inputs: Win/Loss analysis feedback on technical quality.
